title: Glaucoma Detection AI — Titan Nest Winner
desc: Lightweight AI screening system (UNet + YOLOv9) for early glaucoma detection. Won ₹10L grant from Titan Nest/IIM Calcutta and ₹30K at Startup Mania 9.0. Published at ICCCNT 2025 (IIT Indore). [Private Repo]

title: AI Brain Tumor Radiotherapy Pipeline
desc: End-to-end multimodal AI system for GBM radiotherapy planning on BraTS2020. 3D UNet (Dice WT=0.929) + MedGemma 1.5 radiology reports + LangChain RAG clinical agent + GPU-accelerated GTV/CTV/PTV contouring on dual Tesla T4 GPUs. 50× faster than CPU baseline. [Private Repo]

title: Smart Email Assistant
desc: LLM-powered assistant that fetches and summarizes Gmail inboxes, then sends key alerts via WhatsApp using Twilio.

title: Doctor-Agent — LLM Appointment Assistant
desc: AI-powered appointment and reporting system using LangChain + Groq. Features natural language scheduling, doctor dashboards, and Google Calendar integration.

title: Housing Price Prediction (Big Data)
desc: Built with PySpark to analyze housing data and predict prices. Includes ML modeling, visualization, and real-time predictions via Flask.

title: Sign Language Recognition
desc: Real-time interpreter for 36 alphanumeric hand gestures using webcam and Graph Convolutional Networks. Freelance project.

title: Bookstore Inventory App
desc: End-to-end MERN stack app to manage books, inventory, orders, and user roles with full CRUD functionality.

title: Movie Recommendation System
desc: ML-powered recommender with dual models: one using static datasets and the other fetching real-time data via TMDB API.

title: Web Scraping Automation Tool
desc: Flexible Python scraper to extract data from structured websites. Used for job listings, product info, and news.

title: Interactive Portfolio with RAG Chatbot
desc: This portfolio featuring a RAG chatbot (Groq LLaMA 3.3 + Local Embeddings) that answers questions about my skills and projects using semantic search.
